name: token-economy
description: Token-economy levers for multi-agent Claude Code work: discover-once context-pack, terse read-only analysis lenses, a frugal main-thread output-style, a pluggable memory adapter, and cap+cache. Cuts INPUT/orchestration tokens; complements caveman (output compression). Independently installable.

plugins.name: token-economy
plugins.description: Cut INPUT/orchestration tokens (and add output discipline) for multi-agent work. Mechanisms, not advice: context-pack, terse read-only lenses, frugal output-style, pluggable memory, cap+cache. Stacks with caveman.
